summary: Gate commands (conformance, code-review) that need to write `[AVOID]` memory entries should define `route_memory_file()` and `write_memory_entry()` as inline shell functions using: dedup via `grep -qF`, 30-entry cap check, mawk-compatible two-arg awk expiry cleanup, and `sed -i "/^---$/i ENTRY"` to insert before the PROVISIONAL section delimiter.
